name: routine
description: Daily operating contract — cadence (dispatcher ticks + work blocks), OKR-anchored priorities, autonomy tiers, comms policy, and an agenda seed.

workingDays.description: Working days, prose (shown in the skill)

workHours.description: Working hours, prose (shown in the skill)

tz.description: IANA timezone for schedules and hours

tickCron.description: Cron for the hourly dispatcher tick (keep inside work hours)

tickModel.description: Model for the dispatcher tick — keeps ticks on a cheap model (most end in a skip)

maxSelfWakesPerDay.description: Max agent-booked self-wake-* continuations per day

workBlockCron.description: Cron for the fallback work block (schedule ships disabled)

okrSource.description: Data-relative path to the OKR doc anchoring priorities

channel.description: Primary comms channel once past pilot

ownerName.description: The human owner all pilot-mode comms route to

pilotMode.description: true = no team tagging, everything routes to the owner; false = channel-first threaded comms

task.prompt: Dispatcher tick (pager only — no cognitive work): load the routine skill (Dispatcher tick rules) and workspace/agenda.md, then decide wake/skip per the tick logic. If work is due, book an immediate self-wake-* once-schedule with the intention (NO model override) and end — never do the work in this session. Most ticks should end in a skip.
Load the routine skill and execute one work block per its Cadence section.
